comment_ja: 個人の判断が検査、要件定義、要員配置へ受け渡され、組織の手順として処理される流れを示す図。
comment_en: A diagram showing how an individual judgment is handed off into inspection, requirements definition, and staffing as an organizational process.
alt_ja: 人物アイコンと工程矢印、検査・要件定義・要員・P1/P2 などのラベルを含む組織フロー図
alt_en: An organizational flow diagram with person icons, process arrows, and labels such as inspection, requirements definition, staffing, and P1/P2
